settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.themeDescription: Your experience will be updated to the new Theme.
settingsPage.preferredLanguageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the application.
settingsPage.languageDescription: Your experience will be updated to the new language.
settingsPage.cachingDescription: Choose how the app fetches data to balance speed and freshness.
settingsPage.performanceModeDescription: Caches data for faster page loads. Ideal for most users. Content is automatically refreshed every 5 days.
settingsPage.freshnessModeDescription: Always fetches the latest content. Use this if you need the most up-to-date information.
settingsPage.enableCacheConfirmDesc1: This will store data in your browser for faster loading.
settingsPage.enableCacheConfirmDesc2: Content is automatically refreshed every 5 days. You can also manually clear the cache at any time to see the latest changes.
settingsPage.cacheEnabledDescription: The app will now cache data for faster loads.
settingsPage.flushCacheConfirmDesc: This will remove all cached application data, except for your settings and bookmarks. The app will reload to fetch the latest content from the server.
settingsPage.cacheFlushedDescription: Application cache has been flushed. The page will now reload.

reminders.title: Notification Reminders
reminders.description: Set daily or weekly reminders to continue your studies.
reminders.ctaTitle: Get Better Experience in the App
reminders.ctaDescription: Our desktop and mobile apps offer offline access, reminders, and a better experience. Download now!
reminders.unsupportedPlatform: Your platform is not currently supported for direct download. Please check our releases page.
reminders.permissionDeniedDesc: You need to grant notification permissions in your system settings to enable reminders.
reminders.addDialogDesc: Schedule a time to receive a notification to continue your learning journey.
reminders.addErrorDescDays: Please select at least one day for the reminder.
reminders.addErrorDescLimit: You have reached the maximum of 5 reminders.
reminders.daysErrorDesc: Please select at least one day.
reminders.errorDesc: Failed to add reminder. Please try again.
reminders.streakReminderDesc: A daily nudge to protect your streak
reminders.pausedDesc: We’ll hold off until you resume.
reminders.exactAlarmDesc: To make sure your reminders arrive at the exact time you chose — even when the app is closed — allow “Alarms & reminders” for Learn Seerah on the next screen.
reminders.exactAlarmDelayedNote: Tap to let reminders fire at the exact time, even when the app is closed.
reminders.oemHintTitle: One more step for reliable reminders
reminders.oemHintBody: Your phone aggressively closes apps to save battery, which can stop reminders from arriving when the app is closed. Please allow auto-launch / auto-start for Learn Seerah.

oemHintSteps.xiaomi: Open Settings → Apps → Manage apps → Learn Seerah → enable “Autostart”, and set Battery saver to “No restrictions”.
oemHintSteps.oppo: Open Settings → Apps → Learn Seerah → enable “Allow Auto Launch”, and set Battery usage to “Allow background activity”.
oemHintSteps.vivo: Open Settings → Battery → Background power consumption → allow Learn Seerah, and enable “Auto-start” in the Phone Manager.
oemHintSteps.huawei: Open Settings → Apps → Learn Seerah → enable “Auto-launch” and “Run in background”, and set it to “Manage manually”.

messages.morning: Good morning! It’s {time} — Let’s wake that brain gently... with Seerah ☀️
messages.afternoon: {time} already? Perfect moment to flex your brain muscles 💪
messages.evening: Ah, {time}... Golden hour for learning something soulful 🌇
messages.night: It's {time} and you’re still scrolling? 😅 C’mon, just one quick lesson before bed 😴

streak.title: Keep your streak! 🔥
streak.bodyAlive: Keep your {n}-day streak alive — one quick lesson! 🔥
streak.bodyStart: Start a streak today — just one lesson! 🔥

update.title: NEW UPDATE IS AVAILABLE
update.description: A new version is available with improvements and bug fixes.

settingsPage.privacyPolicyDescription: Learn about how we handle your data and our commitment to your privacy.
settingsPage.offlineModeDescription: Downloads content to your device for a fully offline experience. Content is automatically synced when updates are available.

homePage.welcomeSubtitle: Explore the life and legacy of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ through authentic content, interactive timelines, historical maps, and more.
homePage.notStartedBody: Begin with the first lesson of the Prophet’s ﷺ life.

verse.translation: And We have not sent you, [O Muhammad ﷺ], except as a mercy to the worlds.

learnPage.title: Lessons
learnPage.explore: Browse detailed lessons and events from the Seerah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. Discover a trusted digital resource for seekers of authentic knowledge and history.
learnPage.errorDescription: Please ensure you're connected to the internet. If the problem continues, contact our support to report this issue.
learnPage.lockedHint: Finish the previous lesson to unlock
learnPage.placementIntro: Answer these questions from the lessons you’d skip. Pass to unlock.
learnPage.placementFail: Not yet — keep learning to unlock this.
learnPage.question: Question

newcomer:
Begin your journey
through the Seerah.

Your first step
is waiting for you.

Every great journey
starts with one lesson.

Open the first chapter —
your path begins here.
on_track:
Beautiful work today —
keep building your journey.

Another step forward,
another day of growth.

{n} days of learning —
may Allah bless your dedication.

Small steps today,
great barakah tomorrow.

Your consistency is inspiring —
keep moving forward.
pending:
Today's lesson is waiting —
keep your streak alive.

Just a few minutes today
keeps your journey going.

Pick up where you left off —
your streak is still alive.

One lesson today
is all it takes.
last_chance:
Last chance today —
don't break your streak.

The day is almost over —
you're only one step away.

Keep your hard-earned streak —
finish a quick lesson.

Your streak needs you —
make today count.
missed_1_2:
You paused today —
don't give up now.

One missed day
doesn't define your journey.

Tomorrow is a fresh start —
your path is still here.

Welcome back anytime —
let's continue together.
missed_3_7:
It's okay, everyone slips —
come back stronger.

Every comeback begins
with a single lesson.

The Seerah is patient —
and so is your journey.

It's never too late
to continue your path.
missed_7plus:
Your streak rested —
revive it today.

Every expert begins again —
turn today into Day 1.

A fresh beginning awaits —
the best time to restart is now.

Your path is ready
whenever you return.
milestone:
{n} days of learning —
a truly remarkable journey.

{n} days on this path —
barakah in your learning.

You reached {n} days —
AlhamduliLlah, keep it up.

learnPage.goalReachedMsg: Goal smashed — {n} days strong! Keep the fire alive 🔥
learnPage.continueStreakMsg: Do a lesson today to continue your streak 🔥
milestoneLines: On fire! Hit {n} days by {date} to level up 🚀
Keep going — just {r} more days to your {n}-day milestone!

quizEnginePage.title: Quizzes
quizEnginePage.description: Test your Seerah knowledge with interactive quizzes. Learn as you go and challenge yourself to better understand the life of the Prophet ﷺ.
quizEnginePage.noQuizzesFound: No premade quizzes available for this language yet.
quizEnginePage.aiQuizDescription: Generate a custom quiz based on the topics you choose.
quizEnginePage.aiQuizGeneratorDescription: Select content from our library to create a unique quiz tailored to your study needs.
quizEnginePage.knowledgeBaseDescription: Select the specific content areas you want to include in your quiz. Mix and match for a diverse challenge!
quizEnginePage.configureQuizDescription: Set the number of questions and choose the types of questions you'd like the AI to generate.
quizEnginePage.noItemsSelected: No items selected. Click the button to get started.
quizEnginePage.focusDatesDesc: Questions about specific dates and years.
quizEnginePage.difficultyMediumDesc: More detailed questions for the knowledgeable.

quizPage.errorDescription: Please make sure you're connected to the internet. If the problem persists, contact our support to report this issue.
quizPage.resultGreat: Brilliant work — you really know this!
quizPage.resultGood: Nicely done — keep building your knowledge.
quizPage.resultKeepGoing: Good effort — review and try again to master it.

glossaryPage.title: Glossary
glossaryPage.description: Understand Islamic and Seerah-related terms with our comprehensive glossary — designed for learners, researchers, and students alike.

referencesPage.title: References
referencesPage.description: Access authentic scholarly references and sources behind the Seerah. Explore verified, cited, and reliable historical sources.
referencesPage.errorDescription: Please ensure you're connected to the internet. If the problem continues, contact our support to report this issue.
referencesPage.noReferences: No references available for this language yet.

bookmarksPage.title: Bookmarks
bookmarksPage.description: Quickly revisit your saved Seerah articles, terms, maps, and quizzes. Your personalized learning space on LearnSeerah for easy access during your study.
bookmarksPage.noBookmarks: You have no bookmarked items yet.

searchPage.title: Search
searchPage.description: Enter a term below to search.
searchPage.noResults: No results found for your query.
searchPage.pleaseEnterQuery: Please enter a search term to find content.

timelinePage.title: Prophet's Life Timeline
timelinePage.description: Visualize the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ through a chronological timeline of key events, from birth to the final sermon and beyond.
timelinePage.endOfTimeline: You've reached the end of the timeline.

chroniclePage.title: Chronicle
chroniclePage.description: An interactive, media-rich timeline of events from the Seerah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ with photos, maps, and historical context.

aboutPage.title: About LearnSeerah
aboutPage.metaDescription: Learn about LearnSeerah's mission to make authentic Seerah knowledge accessible worldwide through interactive lessons, maps, timelines, and resources.
aboutPage.subtitle: Our story, mission, and the purpose behind building a trusted Seerah learning experience.
aboutPage.statLanguagesSub: Making Seerah accessible to more people
aboutPage.whyText: Seerah knowledge is often scattered across books, lectures, and websites. Our goal is to bring authentic, reliable, and easy-to-understand content into one place — accessible for everyone, everywhere.
aboutPage.noContributorsText: Be the first to join this blessed project and leave a lasting legacy.
aboutPage.helpSubtitle: We welcome everyone to contribute and help us grow.
aboutPage.helpTranslateText: Help translate lessons into your language
aboutPage.helpReportText: Help us fix bugs and improve the experience
aboutPage.duaText: We humbly ask for your duas for everyone involved in the creation and maintenance of LearnSeerah. May Allah ﷻ accept this work, forgive our shortcomings, and make it a source of ongoing reward.
aboutPage.duaArabic: رَبَّنَا تَقَبَّلْ مِنَّا إِنَّكَ أَنْتَ السَّمِيعُ الْعَلِيمُ
aboutPage.duaTranslation: “Our Lord, accept [this] from us. Indeed You are the All-Hearing, the All-Knowing.”
aboutPage.onboardingMessage: May this humble resource be a means of guidance and enlightenment for all who seek it.

editContentModal.title: Edit Content
editContentModal.description: How would you like to edit this {contentType}?

mapsPage.title: Interactive Seerah Map
mapsPage.description: Discover the key locations and regions from the Seerah of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ using interactive maps, historical context, and detailed geographical insights.
mapsPage.noEventsForLocation: No events listed for this location.
mapsPage.legendsModalDescription: Understanding the symbols and colors on the map.
mapsPage.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, title or ID...
mapsPage.searchNoResults: No locations found matching your search.
mapsPage.listingDescription: Explore the Seerah through different interactive map formats.
mapsPage.interactiveMapDescription: Explore important locations, regions, and events on a filterable, zoomable map.
mapsPage.highlightsMapDescription: Explore key events from the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ in this interactive Seerah Highlights map. See where and when major moments happened — with quick facts, dates, and places.
mapsPage.eventsMapDescription: Dive into the full story of the Seerah with our detailed Events Map. Read in-depth narratives of each key event in the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, shown across time and place.

mapTour.welcomeTitle: Welcome to the Interactive Seerah Map
mapTour.welcomeDescription: Embark on a visual journey through the blessed life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ. This guide will help you navigate the historical landscapes and landmark events.
mapTour.stepSearchDescription: Use the search tool to find specific cities, regions, or historical landmarks mentioned in the Seerah.
mapTour.stepLayersDescription: Switch between historical watercolor textures, satellite views, or topographic maps to see the terrain as it was or as it is today.
mapTour.stepTimelineDescription: Drag the slider to see how the landscape of the Seerah evolved year by year, unfolding the history chronologically.
mapTour.stepSidebarDescription: Click on any marker or highlighted region to open a detailed sidebar with stories, events, and historical context for that location.

mapsPage.dataSourceDescription: This interactive map uses a combination of historical records and modern geographical data to visualize the Seerah of Prophet Muhammad (ﷺ).
mapsPage.projectCredits: Developed as part of the LearnSeerah Platform.

offline.noticeDesc: {feature} requires an active internet connection to load dynamic external resources and map tiles.
offline.downloadDescUpdating: Please wait while we download the latest content for an optimal offline experience.
offline.downloadDescReady: All offline content has been successfully updated.

discoverPage.contentLanguagesDesc: Choose the languages you want to see.
discoverPage.hadithBooksDesc: Choose the books to read from.
discoverPage.customizeDesc: Tune your feed and the action bar.
